name: Airbase Spend Management API
what_it_does: Airbase REST API for all-in-one spend management platform covering corporate cards, expense management, accounts payable, and procurement. Enables AI agents to retrieve purchase requests, track vendor payments, access card transaction data, manage approval workflows, and integrate Airbase spend data into ERP and accounting workflows. Airbase is part of Paylocity.
use_cases: Retrieving purchase requests and approval status from procurement automation agents
Accessing corporate card transaction data from expense analytics agents
Tracking vendor invoice and payment status from AP automation agents
Integrating Airbase spend data into ERP and GL reconciliation workflow agents
not_for: Large enterprise procurement without SaaS spend management needs
best_when: A tech company using Airbase for unified spend management wants AI agents to automate purchase approvals, track vendor payments, and integrate spending data into accounting and ERP systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Spend approval bypass or incorrect payment routing creates financial control failures. PRIVACY: Employee spending data and card transactions are personal/financial data.

auth.notes: Airbase API uses OAuth 2.0. Developer access requires Airbase account. Contact Airbase for API partner access. Documentation available to customers.

pricing.paid_tiers: Platform and Premium plans; pricing per seat
pricing.notes: Now part of Paylocity. Pricing negotiated with Airbase/Paylocity sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Spend approval bypass is a financial controls failure
PRIVACY: Corporate card transaction data is personal financial data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Airbase acquired by Paylocity — verify API roadmap and documentation under new ownership
API documentation not fully public — Airbase customers only
US-only data residency — EU companies must assess compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK + PRIVACY: Corporate spend and card transaction data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. Paylocity subsidiary. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate spend and card data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency.
